features.name: Built-In Feature
features.description: A feature built in to the plugin, toggled via a DB flag.

features.name: Valid Zip Feature
features.description: A feature delivered as a standalone plugin ZIP.

features.name: Wrong Author Zip Feature
features.description: Tests PLUGIN_OWNERSHIP_MISMATCH — plugin Author is "Foreign Developer" but feature expects "StellarWP".

features.name: Fatal Zip Feature
features.description: Tests ACTIVATION_FATAL — plugin throws RuntimeException on include.

features.name: High PHP Requirement Zip Feature
features.description: Tests REQUIREMENTS_NOT_MET — requires PHP 99.0.

features.name: High WP Requirement Zip Feature
features.description: Tests REQUIREMENTS_NOT_MET — requires WordPress 99.0.

features.name: Deactivation Fatal Zip Feature
features.description: Tests DEACTIVATION_FAILED — plugin re-activates itself on deactivation.

features.name: Mismatched Directory Zip Feature
features.description: Tests PLUGIN_NOT_FOUND_AFTER_INSTALL — ZIP extracts to a different directory than plugin_file expects.

features.name: Syntax Error Zip Feature
features.description: Tests ACTIVATION_FATAL — plugin contains a PHP ParseError.

features.name: Die On Include Zip Feature
features.description: Tests uncatchable fatal — plugin calls die() on include.

features.name: Activation Fatal Zip Feature
features.description: Tests ACTIVATION_FATAL — activation hook throws RuntimeException.

features.name: No Header Zip Feature
features.description: Tests PREFLIGHT_INVALID_PLUGIN — plugin file has no Plugin Name header.

features.name: No Source Zip Feature
features.description: Tests PLUGINS_API_FAILED — feature exists in catalog but has no ZIP source directory.

features.name: Unavailable Zip Feature
features.description: Tests REST validation — is_available is false, rejected before reaching the strategy.
